title: centaurium minus var. suffruticosum
intro: Centaurium minus var. suffruticosum, also known as the alpine centaury or mountain centaury, is a small perennial plant belonging to the gentian family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and gastritis. The health benefits of Centaurium minus var. suffruticosum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture, tea, or dried extract, and is recommended for use in moderation to alleviate digestive discomfort and support gastrointestinal health.
